summary: Implemented DecisionLogger.query() with AND-semantics filtering (agentId, outcome, timeRange), timestamp-descending sorting, and limit/offset pagination. Implemented I6 delegation non-escalation in ValidationEngine for agent.spawn and agent.delegation.grant — checks delegated_capabilities param against snapshot enabled set, denies with I6_DELEGATION_ESCALATION if any exceeds bounds. 25 new tests (15 query + 10 delegation). 152 kernel tests total, all passing.
